fixtures.ios_report_full_changed.json: All currently emitted report keys, encrypted sensitive/audio/weather/health signals changed=true.
fixtures.ios_report_unchanged.json: Same encrypted sensitive/audio/weather/health signal shape with changed=false.
fixtures.ios_report_missing_permission_unavailabl: NSNull data shape for missing permission and authorized-but-unavailable signals.
fixtures.ios_report_dropped_upload.json: Content keys unavailable: encrypted signals are omitted from context_snapshot.
fixtures.ios_photo_evaluate_document.json: Current iOS photo/evaluate body: metadata + content_envelope + optional meta_envelope, no exif_gps.

dropped_upload.source_behavior: encryptedContextItem returns nil when content keys are unavailable, so collectContextSnapshotItems compactMaps the signal out of the report.

human_device_report.note: Agents can prepare fixtures and tests, but only a human can certify that the iOS app hit the backend from a device or simulator.
